description: Foresight team presents a decentralized prediction market utilizing a central limit order book, discussing its advantages over AMM-based prediction markets.
topic_summary: The presentation covers the mechanics of a decentralized prediction market, emphasizing the benefits of a central limit order book compared to AMM models, particularly in terms of fee structures and market maker sophistication. Key examples include betting on political outcomes and sports events [t=1:04 - t=3:24].
